title: Write flaky-test first-responder checklist
prompt: Write `docs/flaky_test_checklist.md` as a first-responder checklist for when a test starts flaking in CI. The list must have exactly these 5 bullet points in this order: (1) reproduce with `mix test --seed N` matching the failing run, (2) check for Process.sleep and replace with assert_receive, (3) look for ownership errors in the log, (4) check for hard-coded test data violating unique constraints, (5) check for `on_exit` DB writes. It must NOT recommend disabling async as the first step.
tier_rationale: Ordered checklist. Claude reliably produces this when all five items are enumerated in the prompt.
research_citation: "If tests pass with `--seed` but fail randomly, you have state leakage between tests." — oliver-kriska exunit-patterns.md
